'''68-RKO''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] in the service of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He happened to be traveling on the same [[pleasure cruiser]] as [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and followed him in order not to be considered luggage. While accompanying Kenobi he witnessed the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi]] save the ship from [[Merson pirates/Legends|Merson pirates]], and defuse a hostile mob of passengers. He later told the story to Bail Organa, who in turn told the story to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].
